$comment: FC17.5 D-CSUBSET-AUTO-TYPE-INFERENCE (C23 6.7.9): `auto x = expr;` end-to-end. Exercises every shipped inference class with a runtime consequence: width (short->2 / long-long->8), string-literal decay (char*, sizeof 8 + runtime deref), array-variable decay (p[1]), function-name decay (call through the inferred pointer), braced-single `auto b = {4}`, constexpr-auto as an array dimension, static-auto storage duration (bump() accumulates across calls), `for (auto i = 0; ...)`, and the Pass-1.5-visibility `int arr[sizeof(x)]` dimension. argc-seeded; exit = 42 on every 64-bit target incl. the shipped release pipeline. RED-on-revert: without the feature `auto x = 42;` is P0009 (the declHead reads `x` as a type name).
